name_en: With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Extra Mini Bucket Bag
name_cn:
With full packaging)!!️【New】GG Extra Mini Bucket Bag
The new small leather goods series playfully uses vibrant colors to present eye-catching new works. This bucket bag features a classic drawstring closure design paired with a practical and versatile chain shoulder strap.
Model: 783175
Size: 14✖️17✖️13cm
Color: Brown/Light Blue Canvas
